product.name: SubDraw
product.positioning: Construction draw management and invoice protection platform for general contractors
product.tagline: One system for every subcontract, draw, invoice, and approval
product.pricing_model: Active subcontracts — not users, not seats, not subcontractors
demo_cta_options: If SubDraw catches one invoice overrun this year, it paid for itself — subdraw.com/login
See how it works in 8 minutes — subdraw.com/login
Try it free for 7 days — subdraw.com/login
Built for GCs. See it yourself — subdraw.com/login
No call needed. See the full thing — subdraw.com/login

starter.label: Starter
starter.best_for: Remodelers, small GCs, companies getting started
starter.positioning: If SubDraw catches one invoice overrun this year, it paid for itself completely.

professional.label: Professional
professional.best_for: Growing contractors, GCs managing 2-4 active projects
professional.positioning: One caught overrun on a single job covers your entire year of SubDraw.

scale.label: Scale
scale.best_for: Established GCs, multi-crew companies, contractors running numerous projects
scale.positioning: Unlimited protection across every job, every subcontract, every invoice, all year.

core_workflow: Contract creation with scope and retainage
invoice_protection_angles: Change orders tracked so nothing slips through
Schedule of values locks billing to approved amounts
Complete audit trail for every dollar approved
Lien waiver collection built into the workflow
Payment disputes eliminated with documented approvals
value_props: Catch invoice overruns before you pay them
One system for every sub, draw, invoice, and approval
Subcontractors are always free — they submit directly
Complete audit trail for every payment decision
Lender-ready draw packages in one click
Replace spreadsheets, email chains, and paper pay apps
pain_points: Missing lien waivers that create legal exposure
Draw documentation that takes days to compile
No audit trail when payment disputes happen
Change orders that fall through the cracks
Paying subs before verifying work completion

active_subcontracts_signals: handles construction loans with lender draw requests
disqualifiers: already using Procore draw module heavily

plan_targeting.starter_149: up to 10 active subcontracts — remodelers, small GCs
plan_targeting.professional_299: up to 30 active subcontracts — growing GCs with 2-4 projects
plan_targeting.scale_599: unlimited subcontracts — established GCs, multi-crew, multiple projects

high_value_signals: recent permit activity showing active projects
reviews mentioning payment or billing issues
website shows multiple active project types
